name: aroma.com.tr
message: Aroma.com.tr is a Turkish company specializing in the production and distribution of fruit juices, beverages, and natural spring water. Established in 1968, Aroma has grown to become a prominent player in the beverage industry, renowned for its high-quality products made from fresh, locally-sourced fruits. The company's portfolio includes a variety of fruit juices, nectars, and flavored drinks, catering to diverse consumer tastes.
